findings.title: Contract and fixture additions not present in supplied focused diff
findings.evidence: Diff stat shows +1536 (contract) and +1018 (fixture) lines but the focused unified diff omits both files. Their correctness is asserted indirectly by the new mirror tests (deepEqual of included_subphase_ids/result_fields/required_evidence_refs/acceptance_gate_ids/forbidden_boundary_suite_claims/fail_closed_on/permission_audit_receipt_contracts/matrix against policy, assertControlPlaneHermesValidationPermissionAuditBindingResult over definition.result and fixture.result, and definition.result===fixture.result), which pre-validation reports as passing.
findings.recommended_action: Treat contract/fixture content as test-attested rather than directly inspected; if a deeper audit is needed, review the raw JSON additions for the 98-field result block and the two 10-entry receipt arrays.

findings.title: rp00 validator intentionally red until CP00-089 evidence pack is created
findings.evidence: New gate requires inspection.control_plane_hermes_validation_permission_audit_binding_verified===true for each S01-S10 construction-inspection.json, and current cursor now points at RP00.P08.M05.S10. Pre-validation confirms rp00 validator fails solely because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-089 evidence files are not yet created.
findings.recommended_action: Create the cp00-089 evidence pack (manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and S01-S10 construction-inspection.json each setting control_plane_hermes_validation_permission_audit_binding_verified=true) and confirm the rp00 validator passes before final closeout.

required_followups: Create docs/closeout-packs/cp00-089 evidence files (manifest, command-evidence, claude-review-result, adjudication, S01-S10 construction-inspection with control_plane_hermes_validation_permission_audit_binding_verified=true) and confirm `npm run validate:rp00` passes.

Confirm CP00-090 owns RP00.P08.M05.S11 (human-approval marker); CP00-089 correctly leaves source_micro_phase_completed=false, phase_completed=false, next_subphase=RP00.P08.M05.S11 and defers the marker.
parsed_review.summary: CP00-089 binds the 10 Hermes Validation Permission/Audit evidence receipts (RP00.P08.M05.S01-S10) metadata-only. The policy, assembler, result/policy validators, module, and tests are internally consistent and enforce the required boundary: source_micro_phase_completed=false, phase_completed=false, next_subphase=RP00.P08.M05.S11, and all runtime permission/AuthZ/permission-engine/security-trimming/audit-ledger/audit-event/Hermes-packet/command-evidence/product-persistence/runtime-Claude/LDIP-implementation flags=false. The human-approval marker is deferred to CP00-090. Assembler fails closed on upstream pack/next_subphase drift, unsafe boundary claims, and unknown claims; result validator enforces exact 98-field shape, frozen output, and 10/10 receipt contracts+matrix. Findings are review-scope/process caveats only, no functional defects.
